modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about software included in Adobe Creative Cloud License

full_description_text:  
El técnico necesita saber qué software viene con la licencia de Adobe Creative Cloud.  
Están un poco confundidos sobre los programas específicos incluidos.  
Esto es importante para su trabajo y para ayudar a los clientes.
